title: Find and read curves
description: Use function code #751 to read the content of the operati ng curve. A. Use with 0x6B and 0x6C to read the content of the latest curve. Modbus (Hex) Tool 1 / Tool 2 common status R/W 6B Current No. of production report entries (L) R 6C Current No. of production report entries (H) R B. Check the content of history curves. C. Set the time as X axis and the torque as Y axis to draw a torque -time coordinate graph. D. Set the angle as X axis and the torque as Y axis to draw a torque -angle coordinate graph. E. Set the angle as X axis and the torque rate as Y axis to draw a torque rate -angle coordinate graph. F. Read the parameter s content of the cur ve.

error_codes.2: Query type — Must be 0 to 7, 10, 11, 20 to 27,
